description: Redesign the Contact section to be ultra-functional and ultra-interactive. Fix existing bugs (form validation, state handling). Add interactive elements like animated input focus states, real-time character counting, typing indicator animations, interactive social link cards with hover reveals, and smoother transitions between form states.
steps: In src/sections/Contact.tsx: Add proper form validation with real-time feedback - show inline error messages when fields are empty or email is invalid. Add a character counter for the message field. Add animated focus states for inputs (expand border, show label animation).

Fix bugs: (a) After form submission success, the 'Send another' button resets but if the user tries again rapidly the consoleLogs array can leak between submissions - fix by clearing all state properly in handleReset. (b) The error state only shows a console log but never properly resets the form status - add a proper error state with retry button. (c) Add form validation before allowing submit (disable button when fields empty, show validation states).

Make the form inputs more interactive: Add floating label animations (label moves up when input is focused or has value). Add a subtle progress indicator showing how many fields are filled (1/3, 2/3, 3/3).

Redesign the social links section: Make them larger, more interactive cards with hover effects that reveal additional info (e.g., GitHub shows 'View my repos', LinkedIn shows 'Connect with me'). Add subtle entrance animations.
Add a 'form completion' animation: When all 3 fields are filled, show a subtle celebratory micro-animation (like a checkmark pulse or border glow) before the user submits.
Improve the sending/success states: Make the console log animation smoother, add a progress bar during sending, make the success state more celebratory with a confetti-like subtle animation.
Ensure all new interactive elements work properly in dark theme (refer to FEAT-002 dark theme variables).
Update locale files if any new text keys are needed (validation messages already exist in forms.validation section of locale files).
acceptance_criteria: Form has real-time validation with inline error messages
Inputs have animated focus states (floating labels or expanding borders)
Submit button is disabled when form is incomplete
Error state properly shows an error message with retry option
Social link cards are interactive with hover reveals
All states (idle, sending, success, error) transition smoothly
Works correctly in both light and dark themes
Build passes with npm run build
